title: Why Stryker Remains a Top Health Care Name
text: Stryker Corporation ( SYK , Financial) has long been one of my favorite health care names as the company provides some market-leading medical devices.

title: Stryker to participate in the 2022 Wells Fargo Securities Healthcare Conference
text: Kalamazoo, Michigan, Aug. 22, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Stryker (NYSE:SYK) will participate in the 2022 Wells Fargo Securities Healthcare Conference on Thursday, September 8, 2022.

title: Why This Dividend Stock Is a Buy
text: Stryker's medical devices reach more than 100 million patients each year.

title: Should You Really Care About This Company's Short-Term Success?
text: Abbott Laboratories' growth looks much less impressive after removing sales from COVID-19 diagnostics.

title: Stryker Is A Moat-Worthy Buy, Here's Why
text: Stryker is a diversified medical technology company with strong sales growth, profitability, and a long history of dividend growth. It's well positioned to invest in strategic growth areas and benefits from favorable demographic tailwinds.

title: Stryker declares a $0.695 per share quarterly dividend
text: Kalamazoo Michigan, Aug. 03, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Stryker (NYSE:SYK) announced that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.695 per share payable October 31, 2022 to shareholders of record at the close of business on September 30, 2022, representing an increase of 10.3% versus the prior year and unchanged from the previous quarter.
